rounds: Necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers to Lavendra — that's a full fit, his people, no armour. He got that one. Pink toes held all week and the thong at Balmoral was an active choice, not an accident. But the poncho stayed on at Balmoral and the swim group nearly got the hidden-toes routine — joy police took those. The chemist aisle the week before though? Comparing nail shades without flinching? That one belongs to him completely.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers now, but they're still loud when his actual people are watching.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
